title: Gold Heels
writer: Frederick Chapin, John Stone, Henry Martyn Blossom

plot: Following a streak of hard luck at the racetrack, Boots and his pal, Push, are down to their last dime. Boots saves a drunken young man named Kendall from being robbed of his considerable winnings at the roulette table and later d...
